# hrobot_vswitches (Data Source)

List all Hetzner Robot vSwitches (summary view; use hrobot_vswitch for attached servers/subnets).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# All vSwitches on the account.
data "hrobot_vswitches" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `vswitches` (Attributes List) All vSwitches. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vswitches))

<a id="nestedatt--vswitches"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vswitches`

Read-Only:

- `cancelled` (Boolean) Whether the vSwitch is cancelled.
- `id` (Number) vSwitch ID.
- `name` (String) vSwitch name.
- `vlan` (Number) VLAN ID.
